mapper.sql: id, role_code roleCode, role_name roleName, sort_no sortNo, status, remark, create_date createDate, update_date updateDate
mapper.select:
select
from t_role
or role_code like concat('%', #{roleCode}, '%')
or role_name like concat('%', #{roleName}, '%')
order by sort_no asc, id desc

select
from t_role where status = 1 order by sort_no asc, id asc

select
from t_role where role_code = #{roleCode} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into t_role (role_code, role_name, sort_no, status, remark, create_date, update_date) values (#{roleCode}, #{roleName}, #{sortNo}, #{status}, #{remark}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update t_role set role_code = #{roleCode}, role_name = #{roleName}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_date = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_role_permission (role_id, permission_id, create_date) values
(#{roleId}, #{permissionId}, now())
mapper.select: select distinct p.perm_url from t_user_role ur inner join t_role r on ur.role_id = r.id and r.status = 1 inner join t_role_permission rp on r.id = rp.role_id inner join t_permission p on rp.permission_id = p.id and p.status = 1 where ur.user_id = #{userId} and p.perm_url is not null and p.perm_url != ''
select r.role_name from t_user_role ur inner join t_role r on ur.role_id = r.id and r.status = 1 where ur.user_id = #{userId} order by r.sort_no asc, r.id asc
select r.role_code from t_user_role ur inner join t_role r on ur.role_id = r.id and r.status = 1 where ur.user_id = #{userId} order by r.sort_no asc, r.id asc
